summary: Netflix-style Dashboard Mobile-First Testing Complete - All 16 features verified. Mobile (390px): Hero 60vh ✓, horizontal scroll metrics ✓, 160x220 cards ✓, 4 story rows ✓, 2-col features with 10 tools ✓, sticky bottom nav with 5 items ✓, Create button elevated ✓. Desktop (1920px): Hero 72vh ✓, 4-col metrics grid ✓, 220x300 cards ✓, no bottom nav ✓, admin bar visible for admin users ✓. Activity bar renders ✓, footer shows credits ✓, shimmer loading (no spinners) ✓, cards navigate to /app/story-video-studio ✓.
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard.js line 135: Hero section correctly uses h-[60vh] lg:h-[72vh] for responsive hero heights
Dashboard.js line 247: Metrics strip uses overflow-x-auto scrollbar-hide sm:grid sm:grid-cols-4 for horizontal scroll on mobile, grid on desktop
Dashboard.js line 331: Story cards use w-[160px] h-[220px] lg:w-[220px] lg:h-[300px] for responsive card sizes
Dashboard.js line 473: Features grid uses grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 xl:grid-cols-5 for responsive columns
Dashboard.js line 542: Sticky bottom nav uses lg:hidden to hide on desktop
Dashboard.js line 549-559: Create button is elevated with -mt-4 class and cta-glow effect
Dashboard.js line 748-754: Shimmer CSS animation uses @keyframes shimmer with linear-gradient, no spinners
Dashboard.js line 698-712: Story rows render in correct order: Trending, Continue, Fresh, Unfinished
Dashboard.js line 454-465: All 10 creator tools defined in FEATURES array
context_for_next_testing_agent: Netflix-style Dashboard fully verified at both mobile (390x844) and desktop (1920x800) viewports. All responsive breakpoints working correctly. Key findings: Hero 60vh mobile/72vh desktop, metrics strip horizontal scroll on mobile/4-col grid on desktop, story cards 160x220 mobile/220x300 desktop, sticky bottom nav only on mobile with elevated Create button, admin bar only visible for admin users on desktop, shimmer loading with CSS keyframe animation (no spinners), all 10 creator tools in 2-col mobile/4-col desktop grid, activity bar shows real-time messages, cards navigate to /app/story-video-studio on click.

mobile_hero_60vh.details: Hero renders at 506px (~60vh of 844px viewport) with poster/gradient, FEATURED badge, title, hook, full-width Continue Story button

mobile_metrics_horizontal_scroll.details: Metrics strip has overflow-x-auto class for horizontal scrolling on mobile

mobile_story_cards_160x220.details: Story cards measure exactly 160px x 220px on mobile viewport

mobile_4_story_rows.details: All 4 rows render: Trending Now, Continue Your Story, Fresh Stories, Unfinished Worlds

mobile_creator_tools_2col_10_tools.details: Features grid shows 10 tools in 2-column layout (grid-cols-2)

mobile_sticky_bottom_nav_5_items.details: Sticky bottom nav visible with Home, Explore, Create (center), Stories, Profile

mobile_create_button_elevated.details: Create button elevated above nav bar with -mt-4 and cta-glow effect

desktop_metrics_4col_grid.details: Metrics strip uses sm:grid sm:grid-cols-4 for 4-column layout

desktop_story_cards_220x300.details: Story cards measure exactly 220px x 300px on desktop viewport

desktop_no_sticky_bottom_nav.details: Sticky bottom nav has lg:hidden class and is not visible on desktop

desktop_admin_bar_for_admin.details: Admin bar visible for admin user with ADMIN PANEL link and quick links

activity_bar_realtime.details: Activity bar renders with real-time messages like 'Someone shared a story'

footer_story_count_credits.details: Footer shows story count and credits (999366 credits displayed)

shimmer_loading_no_spinners.details: Shimmer CSS animation found in styles, no spinner elements detected

cards_navigate_to_studio.details: Card click navigates to /app/story-video-studio with prefilled data
